# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '16'

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: success()

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Deploy to Production
      env:
        DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_KEY }}
      run: |
        echo "$DEPLOY_KEY" > deploy_key
        chmod 600 deploy_key
        ssh -i deploy_key user@production-server 'cd /path/to/app && git pull && npm install && npm run build && pm2 restart app'
